items.caption: A serene night scene with a full moon rising over a silhouette of pine trees. the moon is prominently displayed in the sky, casting a soft glow on the landscape. the text overlay reads "blessed is he who has placed in the sky great stars & placed therein a burning lamp & luminous moon. quran 25:61." this suggests that the image is likely intended for a religious context, possibly as a reflection on the beauty of nature and the divine. the overall atmosphere is peaceful and contemplative, inviting viewers to appreciate the beauty of the natural world and the spiritual significance of the moon in islamic teachings.
